stem: On June 30, 2022, there were 120 million mobile phone subscribers in a country. The major providers were OmegaCorp, Nexus, Aurora, Pacific, and Beacon. If a mobile subscriber on June 30, 2022, is selected at random, the probability that the person selected was an OmegaCorp subscriber is 0.38. There were p million OmegaCorp subscribers in the country on June 30, 2022. To the nearest integer, what is the value of p?
rationale: The correct answer is 46. The probability of randomly selecting an OmegaCorp subscriber equals the number of OmegaCorp subscribers divided by the total subscribers. So p / 120 = 0.38, giving p = 45.6, which rounds to 46.
